text_candidates.sentence_text: For more information regarding legal proceedings see Note 14 "Legal Proceedings and Claims" to the consolidated financial statements in Item 8 of Part II.
text_candidates.previous_sentence: Any claims and other lawsuits, and the disposition of such claims and lawsuits, whether through settlement or litigation, could be time-consuming and expensive to resolve, divert our attention from executing our business plan, result in efforts to enjoin our activities, lead to attempts by third parties to seek similar claims and, in the case of intellectual property claims, require us to change our technology, change our business practices, pay monetary damages or enter into short- or long-term royalty or licensing agreements.
